name: KeapConnector
description: Connects to the Keap (formerly Infusionsoft) REST API (v1) to read and write contacts, opportunities, orders, tags, and campaigns via OAuth 2.0. Supports OAuth refresh-on-401 and Retry-After-aware 429/5xx retry.

install_fields.label: OAuth2 Client ID
install_fields.placeholder: Enter your Keap OAuth2 Client ID
install_fields.help: Found in Keap → Developer Portal → your application → Keys → Client ID.

install_fields.label: OAuth2 Client Secret
install_fields.placeholder: Enter your Keap OAuth2 Client Secret
install_fields.help: Found alongside the Client ID in the Keap Developer Portal. Stored encrypted by Shielva.

install_fields.label: OAuth2 Scopes
install_fields.help: Space-separated list of Keap OAuth scopes. Keap currently exposes the catch-all 'full' scope for the REST API.

install_fields.label: OAuth2 Redirect URI
install_fields.help: Must match the redirect URI registered in your Keap OAuth application exactly. Leave blank to use the value the gateway injects at deploy time.

install_fields.label: OAuth2 Authorization URL
install_fields.help: Keap's OAuth2 authorization endpoint. Override only if Keap publishes a new URL.

install_fields.label: OAuth2 Token URL
install_fields.help: Keap's OAuth2 token endpoint. Override only if Keap publishes a new URL.

install_fields.label: Keap REST API Base URL
install_fields.help: Base URL for the Keap REST API v1. Override only when routing through an approved proxy.

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Maximum Keap API requests per minute. Default 60 mirrors Keap's published quota.

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates client_id and client_secret and marks the connector as installed. Call before OAuth authorization.

apis.name: Authorize (OAuth Code Exchange)
apis.description: Exchanges an OAuth2 authorization code for access and refresh tokens.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Verifies Keap API connectivity by calling GET /account/profile with the current access token.

apis.name: List Contacts
apis.description: GET /contacts — paginated list of contacts, optionally filtered by email / given_name / family_name.

apis.name: Get Contact
apis.description: GET /contacts/{id} — retrieve a single contact by ID.

apis.name: Create Contact
apis.description: POST /contacts — create a new contact. Accepts given_name, family_name, email_addresses, and phone_numbers per Keap's schema.

apis.name: Update Contact
apis.description: PATCH /contacts/{id} — partially update a contact. Pass any subset of contact fields.

apis.name: List Opportunities
apis.description: GET /opportunities — paginated list of sales opportunities.

apis.name: Create Opportunity
apis.description: POST /opportunities — create a new sales opportunity for a contact at a given stage.

apis.name: List Orders
apis.description: GET /orders — paginated list of e-commerce orders.

apis.name: List Tags
apis.description: GET /tags — return all tags defined in the Keap account.

apis.name: Apply Tag
apis.description: POST /tags/{id}/contacts — apply a tag to one or more contacts.

apis.name: List Campaigns
apis.description: GET /campaigns — paginated list of marketing campaigns.

apis.name: Add Contact to Campaign
apis.description: POST /campaigns/{campaign_id}/sequences/{sequence_id}/contacts/{contact_id} — enroll a contact into a campaign sequence.
